name: Google Sheets
description: This app allows various file manipulation actions to be performed on Google Sheets

actions.name: Add New Rows
actions.description: Use this action to add new rows to the sheet

parameters.name: google_sheet_id
parameters.description: ID of the google sheet. This can be found in the URL

parameters.name: rows
parameters.description: List of list of rows to be added. Example: [["row_1_col_1_data","row_1_col_2_data"],["row_2_col_1_data","row_2_col_2_data"], ...]

parameters.name: sheet_name
parameters.description: Name of the sheet. This can be found in the bottom tabs of the google sheet

actions.name: Create Spreadsheet
actions.description: Create a new spreadsheet and share with users

parameters.name: user_emails
parameters.description: Give a comma seperated list of email IDs to share the file with

parameters.name: permission_type
parameters.description: Select permission type to give to users
